footer.cta_text: Whether you're an architect, designer, or brand — we'd love to hear about your project
footer.quote: A family business with 130 years of heritage — bespoke interiors and furniture defined by technical excellence and lasting value.

home.section_2_text_1: We work closely with architects, designers, and craftsmen to turn design ideas into custom furniture. Our approach combines precise manufacturing with careful attention to detail, ensuring that every piece is produced exactly as envisioned by the designer.
home.section_2_text_2: Using advanced CNC machining, we achieve outstanding dimensional accuracy and perfect tolerances for every detail. Yet, the warmth and individuality of each piece comes from the hands of our craftspeople, who finish every element with care—imparting authenticity and human character.
home.section_2_text_3: Rooted in the European Union, we combine a heritage of craftsmanship with strict quality standards and sustainable sourcing. Our local, traceable supply chains ensure materials are responsibly selected, resulting in furniture that embodies engineered precision and the enduring values of EU-made excellence.
home.section_3_title: Custom-made furniture for homes, offices, hotels, and public spaces
home.section_3_text: Crafted with intention, built to last
home.section_5_pillar_1_text: We work exclusively with premium materials, certified suppliers, and high-performance hardware.
home.section_5_pillar_2_text: In-house design, prototyping, project management, and full custom execution.
home.section_5_pillar_3_text: Robotic machining, optimized workflows, and consistent precision at scale.
home.section_5_pillar_4_text: Technicians, engineers, architects, carpenters, installers — a complete team under one roof.
home.section_6_text: Reliable EU manufacturing for brands and large-scale partners. From prototyping and serial production to packaging and logistics — every step handled by our team.
home.section_7_text: Every project guided by an architect and interior professionals.
home.section_7_option_1_text: Curated furniture lines ready to customize for your space.
home.section_7_option_2_text: Bespoke design and production, made entirely to your vision.
home.section_8_text_1: Zero waste. Responsible process. Lasting design.
home.section_8_text_2: At Atrium, sustainability isn't a claim — it's built into every decision we make. From material selection to production process, we minimize waste, source responsibly, and build things that last.
home.section_10_text: Whether you're an architect, designer, or brand — we'd love to hear about your project

about.section_1_text: The quality of our work stems from tradition — dedicated, refined, and built upon with every project. What began as a family craft has grown into modern production, without ever losing sight of what matters most: precision, care, and the responsibility that comes with decades of trust.
about.section_2_text_1: We are a family company with over 130 years of tradition in woodworking and interior design — now led by the fourth generation. Our story began in a craft workshop; today it continues in modern production, where knowledge, dedication, and a feel for the material come together in every project.
about.section_2_title: We create complete interiors and bespoke furniture
about.section_2_text_2: — for residential homes, commercial spaces, hotels, and demanding public buildings. Our projects span Slovenia and abroad, united by a quality that endures.

production.section_2_text: EU manufacturing partner for developers, brands, architects, interior professionals, and public tenders.
production.section_3_text: Over a century of hands-on expertise, combined with advanced CNC technology — continuously improving processes, capacity, and precision to meet the demands of modern architecture.
production.section_4_feature_1_text: Manufactured and certified in the EU. Reliable timelines, fully compliant with European standards.
production.section_4_feature_2_text: State-of-the-art CNC robotics, automated production lines, and precision finishing — built for consistency at any volume.
production.section_4_feature_3_text: Premium, responsibly sourced materials and high-performance hardware systems selected for durability and longevity.
production.section_4_feature_4_text: From prototype to full production run. Experienced in large-scale furnishing across demanding commercial environments.
production.section_7_text: Your vision. Our production. Full control. You bring the design, we handle everything from engineering and prototyping to serial production, packaging, and delivery. With dedicated project management and all processes under one roof, we ensure consistent quality, precise timelines, and complete transparency at every stage.
production.section_7_feature_1_text: Technical and 3D drawings, engineering support, material consulting, and prototyping.
production.section_7_feature_2_text: Automated CNC machining, surface processing, assembly, and consistent tolerances across every unit.
production.section_7_feature_3_text: Protective, transport-ready packaging adapted to your product and destination.
production.section_7_feature_4_text: In-house storage, scheduled EU deliveries, and reliable coordination from factory to final destination.
production.section_8_label: For architects, developers, and public tenders
production.section_8_text: Custom furniture for hotels, residential developments, and commercial spaces. We produce and deliver complete interior furnishing solutions for large-scale commercial projects. Every piece is made to fit your architecture, brand, and operational demands — on time, on budget.
production.section_8_feature_1_text: Every piece drawn to your exact specifications by our in-house technicians.
production.section_8_feature_2_text: We manage the complete project — furniture, appliances, décor, and installation.
production.section_8_feature_3_text: EU certified, fully documented, and experienced in meeting the compliance requirements of public procurement.
production.section_8_industries_list: Hotels & Hospitality · Furniture Brands · Architectural Studios · Residential Developments · Offices & Corporate · Retail & Commercial · Public Sector

section_1_items.article_1_description: We have refreshed our showroom to present collections and bespoke finishes in a calmer, more architectural setting—book a visit with our team.
section_1_items.article_2_description: Our latest audit reaffirms traceable materials, documented processes, and consistent tolerances across serial production and one-off pieces.
section_1_items.article_3_description: Partnerships with certified suppliers and tighter waste targets are now embedded in how we specify timber, surfaces, and hardware for every project.
section_1_items.article_4_title: Added capacity on the production floor
section_1_items.article_4_description: New CNC capacity and finishing lines shorten lead times for large hospitality and residential programmes without compromising hand-finished detail.
section_1_items.article_5_description: Custom joinery, loose furniture, and coordinated installation for a new European hotel concept—developed closely with the interior architect.
section_1_items.article_6_description: Our team hosted architects and designers around material honesty, repairability, and furniture that is built to stay relevant for decades.
section_1_items.article_7_description: A recent industry mention highlighted our blend of automated machining and specialist hand work on complex geometries and veneers.
section_1_items.article_8_description: New technical designers strengthen 3D development, prototyping, and on-site coordination for developers and furniture brands.
section_1_items.article_9_description: Refined logistics partnerships mean predictable scheduling for cross-border projects, from factory packing to installation-ready handover.

careers.section_1_text: We believe the best work happens in an environment that feels open, supportive, and grounded. At Atrium, people grow through collaboration — whether they're crafting in the workshop, designing, engineering, or supporting the team from our offices.
careers.section_2_text: What matters most is a calm mindset, respect for the craft, and a willingness to learn. We look for people who communicate thoughtfully, pay attention to every detail, and take pride in steady, reliable work — people who appreciate design and materials, value teamwork, and bring a modern, forward-looking perspective to everything they do.
careers.section_3_value_1_text: Warm, considerate dialogue — with colleagues, clients, and partners. We believe clear, respectful communication is the foundation of every successful project.
careers.section_3_value_2_text: An appreciation for design, materials, and the precision that makes each piece right. Attention to detail and a steady, reliable work ethic guide everything we do.
careers.section_3_value_3_text: A modern, forward-looking approach rooted in collaboration. We solve problems together, support each other, and keep improving how we work.
careers.section_4_note: No exact match? Send a short note and portfolio either way — we regularly meet people before a role is formalised.
careers.section_5_text_1: Send your CV, portfolio, or a few lines about the work you are proud of.

senior_furniture_designer.subtitle: Ljutomer, Slovenia
senior_furniture_designer.description_1: Develop furniture concepts and detailed designs for bespoke residential and hospitality projects
senior_furniture_designer.description_2: Create technical drawings, 3D models, and material specifications
senior_furniture_designer.description_3: Collaborate closely with architects and clients to refine design intent
senior_furniture_designer.description_4: Select materials, finishes, and hardware in line with project requirements
senior_furniture_designer.description_5: Oversee prototyping and ensure design accuracy through production
senior_furniture_designer.description_6: Maintain the studio's design library and material sample archive
senior_furniture_designer.requirements_1: Degree in furniture design, industrial design, or interior architecture
senior_furniture_designer.requirements_2: Minimum 5 years of experience in custom furniture or high-end interior design
senior_furniture_designer.requirements_3: Proficiency in 3D modelling software (SolidWorks, Rhino, or equivalent)
senior_furniture_designer.requirements_4: Strong material knowledge — timber, veneers, metals, upholstery
senior_furniture_designer.requirements_5: Fluent communication in English; Slovenian or German is an advantage
senior_furniture_designer.offer_1: Work in a stable, family-owned company with a collaborative team
senior_furniture_designer.offer_2: Involvement in high-profile residential and hospitality projects across Europe
senior_furniture_designer.offer_3: Access to an in-house workshop and CNC production facility
senior_furniture_designer.offer_4: Full-time (Monday–Friday), permanent employment with a 6-month probation period
senior_furniture_designer.location_text: Studio and production: Kolodvorska ulica 28, Ljutomer

cnc_programming_specialist.subtitle: Ljutomer, Slovenia
cnc_programming_specialist.description_1: Programme and optimise CNC machining operations for furniture components
cnc_programming_specialist.description_2: Prepare CAM toolpaths and production-ready files from technical drawings
cnc_programming_specialist.description_3: Set up and calibrate CNC machines for new production runs
cnc_programming_specialist.description_4: Monitor machining quality and adjust parameters for optimal tolerances
cnc_programming_specialist.description_5: Collaborate with the engineering team on production feasibility and improvements
cnc_programming_specialist.description_6: Maintain and troubleshoot CNC equipment and tooling
cnc_programming_specialist.requirements_1: Technical education in woodworking, mechanical engineering, or CNC technology
cnc_programming_specialist.requirements_2: Experience with CNC programming software (MEGACAD, MEGATISCHLER, AlphaCAM, or similar)
cnc_programming_specialist.requirements_3: Ability to read and interpret technical drawings
cnc_programming_specialist.requirements_4: Precision-oriented mindset with strong problem-solving skills
cnc_programming_specialist.requirements_5: Willingness to learn new technologies and production methods
cnc_programming_specialist.offer_1: Work with modern CNC machinery in a well-equipped production facility
cnc_programming_specialist.offer_2: Regular training on new software and machining techniques
cnc_programming_specialist.offer_4: Full-time (Monday–Friday), permanent employment with a 6-month probation period

project_engineer_hospitality.subtitle: Ljutomer, Slovenia
project_engineer_hospitality.description_1: Manage furniture and interior fit-out projects for hotels and hospitality venues
project_engineer_hospitality.description_2: Coordinate between design teams, production, and on-site installation crews
project_engineer_hospitality.description_3: Prepare project timelines, budgets, and technical documentation
project_engineer_hospitality.description_4: Conduct site visits and measurements for ongoing projects
project_engineer_hospitality.description_5: Ensure compliance with project specifications, quality standards, and deadlines
project_engineer_hospitality.description_6: Serve as the primary point of contact for clients throughout the project lifecycle
project_engineer_hospitality.requirements_1: Degree in engineering, architecture, or a related technical field
project_engineer_hospitality.requirements_2: Experience in project management within furniture, interiors, or construction
project_engineer_hospitality.requirements_3: Strong organisational skills and attention to detail
project_engineer_hospitality.requirements_4: Ability to read architectural drawings and technical specifications
project_engineer_hospitality.requirements_5: Driving licence and willingness to travel for site visits
project_engineer_hospitality.offer_1: Work on large-scale hospitality projects across the EU
project_engineer_hospitality.offer_2: A collaborative environment bridging design, engineering, and production
project_engineer_hospitality.offer_3: Professional development and growth within a growing company
project_engineer_hospitality.offer_4: Full-time (Monday–Friday), permanent employment with a 6-month probation period
project_engineer_hospitality.location_text: Project office: Ljutomer, Slovenia — with regular site visits

senior_finishing_craftsperson.subtitle: Ljutomer, Slovenia
senior_finishing_craftsperson.description_1: Apply surface finishes — lacquers, oils, stains, and veneers — to furniture components
senior_finishing_craftsperson.description_2: Prepare surfaces through sanding, filling, and priming to production standards
senior_finishing_craftsperson.description_3: Inspect finished pieces for consistency of colour, texture, and quality
senior_finishing_craftsperson.description_4: Mix and match finishes according to design specifications and client samples
senior_finishing_craftsperson.description_5: Maintain finishing equipment, spray booths, and drying areas
senior_finishing_craftsperson.description_6: Train and mentor junior team members in finishing techniques
senior_finishing_craftsperson.requirements_1: Hands-on experience in furniture finishing, wood coating, or surface treatment
senior_finishing_craftsperson.requirements_2: Knowledge of different finishing systems — water-based, solvent-based, and natural oils
senior_finishing_craftsperson.requirements_3: An eye for colour and surface quality
senior_finishing_craftsperson.requirements_4: Ability to work independently and meet production deadlines
senior_finishing_craftsperson.requirements_5: Carpentry or woodworking background is a strong advantage
senior_finishing_craftsperson.offer_1: A well-equipped finishing workshop with modern spray technology
senior_finishing_craftsperson.offer_2: Work with premium materials on high-end custom furniture
senior_finishing_craftsperson.offer_3: Stable, full-time role in a growing production team
senior_finishing_craftsperson.offer_4: Full-time (Monday–Friday), permanent employment with a 6-month probation period

woodwork_engineer.subtitle: Ljutomer, Slovenia
woodwork_engineer.description_1: Ensure smooth operation and organisation of production and automated processes in modern woodworking
woodwork_engineer.description_2: Draw constructions and prepare production plans for manufacturing and clients
woodwork_engineer.description_3: Prepare workshop drawings and project-technical documentation
woodwork_engineer.description_4: Computer-aided design of products (MEGACAD, MEGATISCHLER) and manufacture of components on CNC machines (CAM)
woodwork_engineer.description_5: Quality control of materials and finished products, including final assembly
woodwork_engineer.description_6: Plan technological development of new products and production processes
woodwork_engineer.description_7: Implement safety measures and environmental protection procedures
woodwork_engineer.requirements_1: Education: woodworking technician, woodwork engineer, or carpenter
woodwork_engineer.requirements_2: Experience with MEGACAD, MEGATISCHLER, or AutoCAD is an advantage but not required — full training provided
woodwork_engineer.requirements_3: Willingness to learn and enthusiasm for furniture production
woodwork_engineer.requirements_4: Proactive approach, cooperation, and team spirit
woodwork_engineer.requirements_5: Motivation for personal growth and expanding professional knowledge
woodwork_engineer.offer_1: Work in a stable company with a young and relaxed team
woodwork_engineer.offer_2: Dynamic work environment with the possibility of field work (site measurements)
woodwork_engineer.offer_4: Full-time (Monday–Friday), permanent employment with a 6-month probation period

furniture_assembler.subtitle: Ljutomer, Slovenia / on-site
furniture_assembler.description_2: Assembly of furniture in production and on-site
furniture_assembler.description_6: Quality control of materials and products, including final assembly
furniture_assembler.description_7: Other tasks as assigned by the supervisor
furniture_assembler.requirements_4: Enthusiasm for this type of work and learning
furniture_assembler.requirements_6: Carpentry education preferred but not required
furniture_assembler.requirements_7: Proactive approach and ability to work in a team
furniture_assembler.offer_1: Permanent employment with a 6-month probation period
furniture_assembler.offer_2: Monday to Friday schedule (Saturdays if needed)
furniture_assembler.location_text: Production facilities: Kolodvorska ulica 28, Ljutomer and on-site

contact.title: Contact
contact.section_1_text: For project enquiries, partnerships, or general questions — reach out to our team directly.
